# opnsense_trust_cert (Resource)

Imports an existing X.509 certificate (and its private key) into the OPNsense trust store. The certificate and private key PEM payloads are write-only.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `certificate` (String) PEM-encoded certificate. Write-only: not refreshed from the API.
- `description` (String) Human-readable name for the certificate.
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded private key. Write-only and sensitive: never read back from the API.

### Optional

- `ca_ref` (String) Reference id of the issuing CA (empty for a self-contained/self-signed certificate).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the certificate.
- `refid` (String) OPNsense reference id, used by other resources to reference this certificate.
